title: Browserless Screenshot Request
description: Schema for the POST /chrome/screenshot, /chromium/screenshot, and /edge/screenshot REST endpoints. Captures a screenshot of a URL or HTML payload after navigation/JavaScript settles, with viewport, full-page, clipping, header, and cookie options.

url.description: URL to navigate to before capture. Either `url` or `html` must be set.

html.description: Inline HTML payload to render. Either `url` or `html` must be set.

options.description: Screenshot capture options passed to Puppeteer's `page.screenshot`.

fullPage.description: When true, capture the full scrollable page height.

omitBackground.description: When true, render with a transparent background (PNG/WebP only).

clip.description: Region of the page to capture.

gotoOptions.description: Navigation options for the initial page.goto call.

waitForSelector.description: Wait for a selector to appear before capture.

cookies.description: Cookies to inject into the page before navigation.

setExtraHTTPHeaders.description: Extra HTTP headers to send with the initial navigation.

blockAds.description: When true, load uBlock-Lite to suppress ads and trackers.

rejectResourceTypes.description: Resource types to block during the capture (e.g. image, font, media).
